message:
fix(web): code review fixes for DCG and Fleet dashboards

- Add formatFutureTime helper for correct expiration date display in DCG allowlist
- Remove unused imports (Settings from DCG.tsx, Pause from Fleet.tsx)
- Fix shared rejection reason state in Fleet PlanApproval component (now per-plan)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
